subsystems.reason: 2512 and 2511 advertise the same MMDiT and text encoder family, so ancestry-aware delta transplant is the lowest-risk starting point.
Shared Qwen2.5-VL family helps, but layered prompt semantics should be merged with conflict resolution rather than naive averaging.
Layered exposes RGBA-VAE while the 2512 family uses RGB-VAE. Treat the layered path as adapter-only unless alpha semantics can be preserved.
Foundation uses 2D while layered uses Layer3D; inject only behind an explicit compatibility gate.

flowchart LR

    B["Qwen-Image-Edit-2511"]
    C["Qwen-Image-Layered"]
    A -->|"delta-merge"| B
    A -->|"adapter-only"| C
    B -->|"edit donor"| D["Fusion Candidate"]
    C -->|"layer logic donor"| D
